amd.title: AMD / PMD / PAB / PMA — Leading questions

questions.prompt: What type of mobility device is it?
What is the device's model?
What type of battery does the device use?
What is the battery's brand?
What is the battery's model?
Was the battery provided by the Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM)?
Have any modifications been made to the device?
What is the main use of the device?
When was the device last used?
How long was the device used for before the incident?
When was the device purchased?
questions.hint: e.g. 6 months ago, 18/02/2022, cannot be determined

questions.prompt: What was the purchase type?
Where was the device purchased from?
What is the name of the retail shop or online platform?
Have you purchased a replacement or add-on battery before?
Does the battery charger plug have the Safety Mark logo?
Does the power adapter of the battery charger have the Safety Mark logo?
When was the battery last charged?
What time was the battery last charged?
How long was the battery charged for?
Where did the fire occur?
Did the fire spread beyond the device?
What was the status of the device prior to the fire?
Is there any other relevant information?
Is this the main affected vehicle (first to catch fire, likely AOFO) or other damaged vehicle?
questions.hint: Other damaged vehicle = affected by fire from another vehicle or other source

questions.prompt: Is the affected vehicle an electric vehicle?
questions.hint: Includes EV cars and EV utility vehicles (refuse trucks, maintenance vehicles)

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of the vehicle?
questions.hint: e.g. Personal, Personal (Rental/Leased), Private Hire, Taxi, Company Vehicle, Personal + Commercial

questions.prompt: Is the vehicle registration plate still visible on the affected vehicle?
What is the vehicle registration plate number?
What is the vehicle ownership status?
What type of vehicle is it?
What is the model of the vehicle?
Any additional vehicle model information?
questions.hint: e.g. Hyundai Ioniq 5 Electric → Exclusive 58 kWh; Honda Fit → 1.3, 1.5

questions.prompt: What is the colour of the vehicle?
What is the age of the vehicle (in years)?
What type of fuel does the vehicle use?
What was the state of the vehicle at the time of fire?
questions.hint: Stationary (engine off or on) or in motion

questions.prompt: What is the mileage (odometer reading in km)?
questions.hint: If unable to recall or heavily damaged, indicate "0"

questions.prompt: What was the point of origin and which locations were visited?
What distance was travelled?
What was the duration of travel?
If the vehicle was idle or stationary, how long was it parked?
What is the frequency of usage of the vehicle?
Were there any abnormalities before the fire?
questions.hint: Dashboard indicators, warning signs, flickering lights, electrical issues, etc.

questions.prompt: Were there any modifications or additions to the vehicle?
Is vehicle insurance information available at the time of incident?
Is vehicle servicing information available at the time of incident?
questions.hint: If not, follow up with affected parties at earliest availability

questions.prompt: Where will the vehicle be sent to now?
Is there any other relevant information?
What is the stove fueled by?
When was the stove last used before the fire?
What was used to light up the stove?
Was there an elbow joint at the stove?
Was the stove area well-ventilated?
Were there multiple attempts to light up the stove?
Were there any abnormalities of the gas and stove system observed before the fire?
questions.hint: e.g. hissing sounds, gas smell, larger fire size than normal

questions.prompt: Were the gas and/or stove system(s) tampered with before the arrival of SCDF?
questions.hint: e.g. gas system was disassembled or modified

questions.prompt: Any faulty equipment?
Is there any other relevant information?
